fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).
fields.label: Schema
fields.name: schema

fields.description: Fields this transform requires in input. Used for DAG validation to catch missing field errors at config time. For templates, use elspeth.core.templates.extract_jinja2_fields() to discover fields.
fields.label: Required Input Fields
fields.name: required_input_fields

fields.description: Input field containing a payload-store content hash.
fields.label: Blob Ref Field
fields.name: blob_ref_field

fields.description: Single-character delimiter used to split CSV fields.
fields.label: Delimiter
fields.name: delimiter

fields.description: Encoding used to decode the CSV blob.
fields.label: Encoding
fields.name: encoding

fields.description: Number of leading CSV records to skip before reading headers or data.
fields.label: Skip Rows
fields.name: skip_rows

fields.description: Explicit normalized column names for headerless CSV blobs.
fields.label: Columns
fields.name: columns

fields.description: Optional mapping from observed CSV headers to normalized names.
fields.label: Field Mapping
fields.name: field_mapping

fields.description: Whether to emit the row index within the parsed CSV document.
fields.label: Include Row Index
fields.name: include_row_index

fields.description: Output field receiving the zero-based CSV data row index.
fields.label: Row Index Field
fields.name: row_index_field

fields.description: Maximum rows emitted for one input blob.
fields.label: Max Output Rows
fields.name: max_output_rows

fields.description: Maximum payload size accepted from the blob store.
fields.label: Max Blob Bytes
fields.name: max_blob_bytes
